name: alert-demo
visual_summary: The alert-demo component is a visually striking and customizable alert box that can be used to highlight important information or alert users of potential issues. It can be used in a variety of scenarios, such as warning users of invalid input, notifying them of system updates, or providing feedback on their actions. This component can be easily integrated into your application to enhance user experience.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready alert component with the following characteristics:

Name: alert-demo
Description: The alert-demo component is a visually striking and customizable alert box that can be used to highlight important information or alert users of potential issues. It can be used in a variety of scenarios, such as warning users of invalid input, notifying them of system updates, or providing feedback on their actions. This component can be easily integrated into your application to enhance user experience.
Style: e.g. customizable colors, responsive, animated
Interactions: e.g. dismissible, clickable, hover effect
Tags: alert, notification, feedback

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
